title: Flower Plains
description:
Small rework to plains generation.
Plains are now full of colorful flowers!
body:
Replaces the seldom generating flower patches in plains with common, small, one flower type patches. Makes the plains look much more full and colorful.

Flowers that can generate in patches include 
**Dandelions**, **Poppies**, **Cornflowers**, **Oxeye Daisies**, **Azure Bluets** and **Alliums**

**Note:** This is a vanilla updated port of [Flowers & Throwels](https://modrinth.com/mod/flowers-and-trowels) mod's built-in datapack. Mod was made by [Lluís](https://modrinth.com/user/Lluis), the original built in datapack for the mod was made by [me](https://modrinth.com/user/Rono). I did get permission from lluís to publish this datapack
